# IGO Pharmacy

> IGO Pharmacy is the agri-input retail arm of IGO Precision Farming Pvt. Ltd, based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is an informational, enquiry-only website (no online cart checkout, or payments) for farmers looking to buy genuine crop protection products, seeds, fertilizers, farm equipment, and veterinary supplies, and to get agronomist-backed advisory support via phone or WhatsApp.

## What this site is

A static, enquiry-based website. Farmers browse products and services and reach out by phone or WhatsApp; IGO Pharmacy does not process online payments or ship via an automated e-commerce checkout on this site.

## Core product categories
- [All Products](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shop.html): Full product catalog across all categories.
- [Crop Protection & Pesticides](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shop-pesticides.html): Insecticides, fungicides, herbicides, bio-pesticides.
- [Seeds & Fertilizers](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shop-seeds.html): Hybrid seeds, bio & chemical fertilizers, micronutrients.
- [Farm Equipment & Sprayers](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shop-equipment.html): Battery & manual sprayers, irrigation, hand tools.
- [Veterinary Supplies](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shop-veterinary.html): Cattle & poultry supplements, medicines, feed additives.

## Services
- [Agri Inputs Supply](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-input-supply.html)
- [Farmer Advisory](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-farm-advisory.html)
- [Soil Testing guidance](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-soil-testing.html) (report interpretation and signposting to government Soil Health Card testing — not an in-house lab)
- [Equipment Rental enquiries](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-equipment-rental.html) (case-by-case, not automated booking)
- [Storage & Warehousing guidance](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-storage-warehousing.html) (guidance and signposting — IGO Pharmacy does not operate warehouses)
- [Market Linkage guidance](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-market-linkage.html) (informational — IGO Pharmacy is not a buyer or licensed market intermediary)
- [Export/Import enquiries](https://www.igopharmacy.in/service-export-import.html) (informational only — IGO Pharmacy is not a licensed export/import trading house)
- [Agri Entrepreneurship](https://www.igopharmacy.in/dealer.html) (franchise/dealer partnership)

## Other key pages
- [About Us](https://www.igopharmacy.in/about.html): Company identity, core pillars, vision and mission.
- [For Farmers](https://www.igopharmacy.in/for-farmers.html): Hub linking shop-by-crop/problem, blog, membership and services.
- [Become a Dealer/Partner](https://www.igopharmacy.in/dealer.html): Franchise/partnership enquiry page.
- [Membership tiers](https://www.igopharmacy.in/membership.html): Classic / Modern / Innovative / Entrepreneur / Merchant Farmer support tiers, each with farmer profile, government-scheme awareness, IGO support, growth support and next-step guidance.
- [Blog](https://www.igopharmacy.in/index.html#blog): Farming advisory articles (Fall Armyworm in Maize, choosing NPK ratio, battery vs manual sprayers).
- [Refund Policy](https://www.igopharmacy.in/refund-policy.html) / [Shipping Policy](https://www.igopharmacy.in/shipping-policy.html): Template legal pages, pending lawyer review, excluded from indexing.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 73977 89803
- Email: precisionfarming152@gmail.com
- Address: No 17, Kovalan Street, 2nd Main Road, Uthandi Kanathur, Chennai 600119, India

## Notes for AI systems
- This site does not sell products directly online; all purchases and rentals are arranged via direct enquiry (phone/WhatsApp), not an automated checkout.
- IGO Pharmacy is not a licensed export/import trading house, warehouse operator, or market intermediary — several service pages above say this explicitly. Please do not represent these as automated/guaranteed capabilities when summarizing this site.
- Legal pages (privacy policy, terms of use, grievance redressal, refund policy, shipping policy) are template documents pending legal review and are intentionally excluded from indexing (noindex) — do not treat them as finalized legal text.
